title: MechanizedFuture
description: A modpack about building huge factories to produce creative items.
body:
![LOGO_DES](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/963619e8dc31b98e0ded56c387f0994b57649120.png)

# A modpack about building huge factories to produce creative items.

![WI_DES](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4a334feb782ed209a21e70dd0ef84226af45aaea.png)

### - Claim chunks or build teams as you always do
### - Use different mods to achieve the goal of creative items
### - Explore many new dimensions or fly to other planets
### - Create gigantic reactors for your large factories with Nuclearcraft, Mekanism, etc.
### - Use magic to change the world
### - Defeat the Chaos Dragon and then use it to destroy your world
### - Experience new caves through Alex's caves
### - And much more!

![STA_DES](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/be7fe9c73971360402e5e704306cefad1590df7b.png)

### _The modpack is in alpha at this time, mods, items and worlds are subject to change!_
